<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from my current position would move me into a lava cell at row 02 column C, which is deadly. I need to change my orientation to avoid moving into lava. Looking at adjacent cells, I can rotate downwards by turning clockwise to face down (`v`). That way, I can move down to row 03 column B, which is safe (floor cell `.`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward leads to lava cell at 03B, which is deadly. To avoid lava, I need to turn to a safer direction. Turning clockwise from facing down will face left (`<`), which points to a wall ('#' at 02A), so that is not an option. Turning counter-clockwise will face right (`>`), which points to a lava cell at 02C, so not safe either. Another rotation is needed to face up (`^`), which points to a wall at 01B. No safe forward movement now. Best option is to turn clockwise to face left (`<`) and then reassess.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 08 column H. I need to move downwards and rightwards to reach the goal. Currently facing left, if I move forward I would hit a wall or lava since to the left from B2 is a wall. Instead, I should turn clockwise to face up (`^`), but up is a wall at row 01. So better to face down to move down safely. From facing left to facing down requires turning clockwise once, then I can move forward down the column B, avoiding the lava which is mainly on columns closer to C and E. This way I avoid lava and gradually get closer to column H and row 8.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

I see lava at row 02 column C and row 03 column C. I should turn clockwise to face right (`>`) to move through safe cells in columns C and D.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

This move will allow me to advance toward the goal located at row 08 column H safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

</thought>
<action>

<thought>

Actually, from down (`v`), turning clockwise will make it face left (`<`), but I want to face right (`>`), so I should turn clockwise twice or use a combination of turns. Better to turn clockwise once to face left, then turn clockwise again to face up, and so on. Or I can turn counter-clockwise once to face right (`>`). So I will turn counter-clockwise to face right.
